---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Rekal
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **OS**: Windows [version]
- **Rekal Version**: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- **Ollama Version** (if applicable): [e.g. 0.1.30]

## Logs
If applicable, attach or paste relevant log entries from `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Rekal\logs\app.log`.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
